primary_variables.matched_definition: Intervention using a compound that inhibits a target protein, pathway, or process.
evidence: Cells at 70% confluence were treated with 1 μM MZ1 dissolved in DMSO, while control cells were treated with an equivalent volume of DMSO for 15 min.
the PROTAC MZ1 (Fig. 1A), our potent and fast VHL-recruiting Bromodomain and Extra-Terminal Domain (BET) degrader

matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: we performed in vitro ubiquitination and cellular degradation assays with wild-type and Lys-to-Arg mutant Brd4BD2 constructs
the triple “ubiquitination zone” mutant significantly impaired ubiquitination
Cells at 70% confluence were treated with 1 μM MZ1 dissolved in DMSO, while control cells were treated with an equivalent volume of DMSO for 15 min.
The E1 Ube1 (150 nM), the UBE2D2 or UBE2R1 (5 μM), Brd4BD2 (5 μM), NEDD8-CRL2VHL (150 nM), and MZ1 (5 μM) were mixed with ubiquitin (100 μM) and incubated... for 5 min at room temperature.

replicate_hints: The replicates were grouped based on their annotation to DMSO and MZ1.

base_candidates_ranked.reason: In vitro samples were analyzed using data-dependent acquisition (DDA) on a Lumos Tribrid and Q Exactive, with label-free quantification (LFQ) implied by the use of MaxQuant and the absence of labeling reagents.
Cellular samples were explicitly acquired in data-independent acquisition (DIA) mode on an Orbitrap Astral and processed with DIA-NN.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: Multiple datasets (in vitro and cellular) specifically target the di-glycine (K-GG) remnant left after trypsin digestion of ubiquitinated proteins.
